task: Use publish.sh as the single publish path for dashboard changes
refresh.sh regenerates data.js from live sources
Run validate_dashboard.py before publish to catch broken loops
If a dashboard-related alias/command is added, also add it to commands.json so it appears in Config & Setup → Quick Commands
If a dashboard file becomes important to operate the system, expose it on the dashboard in the proper page/section
If a new important dashboard file is added, include it in refresh.sh dashboard_files export and render it on the Config & Setup page
Update page HTML when a new section or renderer is needed
Commit and push after changes so Elli can see them online immediately
